scenario: First-time user runs a scan and reviews output/findings

findings.title: Scanner tabs render empty states without explanation
findings.details: These visible tabs have zero tools: Exploit Detection, Utils, Robots. As a first-time user, this looks broken because there is no explanatory empty-state guidance.
findings.fix: Fix category mapping for tabs and add explicit empty-state messaging with next actions when a category has no available tools.

findings.title: Back navigation routes to non-existent page
findings.details: Back action sends users to `/scanner`, but the defined route is `/scans`, causing navigation confusion.
findings.fix: Change hardcoded navigation targets from `/scanner` to `/scans` and add wildcard redirect handling.

findings.title: Settings theme controls are not wired to global theme state
findings.details: Switching to Light does not toggle the app-level theme class; users perceive the setting as non-functional.
findings.fix: Use shared ThemeContext in Settings instead of local component state.
